= & \frac{-2\rho}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}\left(\theta+\frac{-\rho}{\rho+1}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j}^{p_{j}^{F}}\right)\left[d\log P\right]+\frac{-2\omega}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}d\log K+\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}d\log M\\
= & \frac{-2\rho}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}\left(\theta+\frac{-\rho}{\rho+1}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j}^{p_{j}^{F}}\right)\left[\lambda_{\text{Home}}\left(d\log p_{f,j}-\frac{1}{\theta}d\log M\right)+\lambda_{\text{Foreign}}\left(d\log p_{\text{Foreign}}\right)\right]\\
 & +\frac{-2\omega}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}d\log K+\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}d\log M
\end{alignedat}
\]
\[
d\log p_{f,j}=\frac{\frac{-2\rho}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}\left(\theta+\frac{-\rho}{\rho+1}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j}^{p_{j}^{F}}\right)\lambda_{\text{Foreign}}\left(d\log p_{\text{Foreign}}\right)}{1+\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}\left(\theta+\frac{-\rho}{\rho+1}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j}^{p_{j}^{F}}\right)\lambda_{\text{Home}}\left(1-\frac{1}{\theta}\frac{d\log M}{d\log p_{f,j}}\right)+\frac{2\omega}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}\frac{d\log K}{d\log p_{f,j}}-\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}\frac{d\log M}{d\log p_{f,j}}}

\[

With the correction, we have 
\[
P_{j}=\left(\sum_{f}\left(\lambda_{5}\mu\bar{c}_{f,j}\left(\bar{\mu}\frac{D\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{I_{j,I}^{\rho}}\frac{P_{j}}{P_{j}^{-\theta}}\right)^{\frac{-\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\sum_{j}\left(\bar{\mu}\frac{D\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{I_{j,I}^{\rho}}P_{j}^{-1}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}{}^{-\left(\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\times2\rho-\rho\right)}\right)^{-\theta}\right)^{-\frac{1}{\theta}}

\]
So we have 
\[
\left(P_{j}\right)^{1+\frac{\rho\left(1+\theta\right)}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}=\left(\frac{D\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{I_{j,I}^{\rho}}\right)^{\frac{-\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\bar{c}
\]

\left(P_{j}\right)^{\frac{1+2\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}=\left(\frac{D\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{I_{j,I}^{\rho}}\right)^{\frac{-\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\bar{c}

P_{j}=\left(\left(\frac{D\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{I_{j,I}^{\rho}}\right)^{\frac{-\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\bar{c}\right)^{\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1+2\rho}}
\]
\[

Which yields
\[
\max_{I_{j,I}}D\left(p_{j}\right)^{1-\sigma}-\left(D\right)^{\frac{-\rho}{1+2\rho}+1}\left(p_{j}\right)^{\sigma\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)}\left(I_{j,I}\right)^{\rho\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)}\bar{c}-rI_{j,I}
\]
\[
\frac{\rho\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)}{1-\sigma\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}}\left(1-\sigma\right)
\]
and 
\[
\frac{\rho\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)}{1-\sigma\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}}\sigma\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)+\rho\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)=\rho\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)\left(\frac{\sigma\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)}{1-\sigma\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}}+1\right)=\rho\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)\left(\frac{-\sigma+1}{1-\sigma\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}}\right)=\frac{\rho\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)}{1-\sigma\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}}\left(1-\sigma\right)
\]
So we have isoelastic it for $I_{j,I}$. 

Then we have 
\[
\max_{p_{j},I_{j,I}}D\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}\times\left(p_{j}-\left(D\right)^{\frac{-\rho}{1+2\rho}}\left(p_{j}\right)^{\sigma\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}}\left(I_{j,I}\right)^{\rho\left(\frac{\rho}{1+2\rho}-1\right)}\bar{c}\right)-rI_{j,I}
\]
\[
P_{j}=\left(\sum_{f}\left(\lambda_{5}\mu\bar{c}_{f,j}\left(\bar{\mu}\frac{D\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{I_{j,I}^{\rho}}\frac{P_{j}}{P_{j}^{-\theta}}\right)^{\frac{-\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\sum_{j}\left(\bar{\mu}\frac{D\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{I_{j,I}^{\rho}}P_{j}^{-1}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}{}^{-\left(\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\times2\rho-\rho\right)}\right)^{-\theta}\right)^{-\frac{1}{\theta}}
\]
Oligopoly. We have 
\[
\max_{p_{j},I_{j,I}}\frac{\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}}\times\left(p_{j}-c\right)-rI_{j,I}
\]
Then we have 
\[
\frac{\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}}\times c\rho I_{j,I}^{\rho-1}-r=0
\]
\[
\frac{\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}}-\left[\frac{-\sigma\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma-1}\left(p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}\right)+\left(1-\sigma\right)\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}p_{j}^{-\sigma}}{\left(p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}\right)^{2}}\right]\left(p_{j}-c\right)=0
\]
\[
1-\left[\frac{-\sigma\left(p_{j}\right)^{-1}\left(p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}\right)+\left(1-\sigma\right)p_{j}^{-\sigma}}{p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}}\right]\left(p_{j}-c\right)=0
\]
\[
1-\left[\frac{-\sigma\left(p_{j}\right)^{-1}\left(p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}\right)}{p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}}+\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)p_{j}^{-\sigma}}{p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}}\right]\left(p_{j}-c\right)=0
\]
\[
1-\left(p_{j}\right)^{-1}\left[-\sigma+\left(1-\sigma\right)\lambda_{j}\right]\left(p_{j}-c\right)=0
\]
\[
1-\left[-\sigma+\left(1-\sigma\right)\lambda_{j}\right]\left(1-cp_{j}^{-1}\right)=0
\]
\[
\frac{c}{I_{j,I}^{\rho}}\frac{\sigma+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{j}}{\sigma+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{j}-1}=p_{j}
\]
Now we have 
\[
\frac{\left(p_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{p_{j}^{1-\sigma}+p_{-j}^{1-\sigma}}\times c\rho I_{j,I}^{\rho-1}-r=0
\]
So we can write \pagebreak{}

XXXX Distance Shock.
\[
d\log p_{f,j}=-\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{j}-\tau d\log d_{f,j}^{-\tau}\right)
\]
\[
d\log\tilde{x}_{j}=\left(-\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j,I}\right)d\log p_{f,j}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j,A}\left(\tau d\log d_{j,A}\right)
\]
So we get
\[
d\log p_{f,j}=-\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho}\left(\left[\left(-\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j,I}\right)d\log p_{f,j}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j,A}\left(\tau d\log d_{j,A}\right)\right]-\tau d\log d_{f,j}^{-\tau}\right)
\]
\[
\left(1-\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho}\left(\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}+\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j,I}\right)\right)d\log p_{f,j}=\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho}\underbrace{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}_{\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left((\rho+1)-\rho\right)}\lambda_{j,A}\left(\tau d\log d_{j,A}\right)+\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho}\tau d\log d_{f,j}^{\tau}
\]
Then we have\textmu 
\[
p_{j}=\lambda_{j,A}\left(d\log c_{A}+\tau d\log d_{j,A}\right)+\lambda_{j,I}d\log p_{f,j}
\]
So we have the reallocation channel. 

XXXX Assembly Cost.
\[
d\log\tilde{x}_{j}=-\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j,A}\left(\tau d\log c_{A}\right)
\]
and 
\[
\left(1-\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho}\left(\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}+\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j,I}\right)\right)d\log p_{f,j}=\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho}\underbrace{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}_{\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left((\rho+1)-\rho\right)}\lambda_{j,A}\left(\tau d\log c_{A}\right)
\]

XXXX Assembly Cost with spillovers. 
\[
\frac{\pi_{f}}{\left(p_{f,j}\right)^{-\frac{1+2\rho}{2\rho}\frac{1}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}}=\frac{\lambda_{4}K^{\frac{\omega\left(\theta-1\right)}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}\left(\bar{\mu}\tilde{x}_{j}M^{-1}p_{f,j}^{\theta}d_{f,j}^{-\tau}d_{f}^{-\tau}\right)^{\frac{1}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}\left(N\right)^{\frac{1+\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}}{\left(\lambda_{5}\mu K^{\frac{-2\omega}{1+2\rho}}\left(d_{f}^{-\tau}\right)^{\frac{-2\rho}{1+2\rho}}\left(\bar{\mu}\tilde{x}_{j}M^{-1}d_{f,j}^{-\tau}\right)^{-\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho}}\left(N\right)^{-\left(\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}\times2\rho-\rho\right)\frac{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}{1+2\rho}}\right)^{-\frac{1+2\rho}{2\rho}\frac{1}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}}
\]
\[
\frac{\pi_{f}}{\left(p_{f,j}\right)^{-\frac{1+2\rho}{2\rho}\frac{1}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}}=K^{\frac{\omega\left(\theta-1\right)-\frac{2\omega}{\rho}}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}\left(p_{f,j}^{\theta}\right)^{\frac{1}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}\left(N\right)^{\frac{1+\rho\left(1-\theta\right)-\frac{1+2\rho}{2\rho}}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}
\]
\[
\pi_{f}=K^{\frac{\omega\left(\theta-1\right)-\frac{2\omega}{\rho}}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}\left(p_{f,j}\right)^{\frac{\theta-\frac{1+2\rho}{2\rho}}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}\left(N\right)^{\frac{1+\rho\left(1-\theta\right)-\frac{1+2\rho}{2\rho}}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}
\]
And we have 
\[
d\log K=\left(1+\gamma_{f}\right)\lambda_{U}d\log\pi_{f}
\]
\[
d\log M=\gamma_{f}d\log\pi_{f}
\]
So we get 
\[
\pi_{f}=\pi_{f}^{\frac{\left(1+\gamma_{f}\right)\left(\omega\left(\theta-1\right)-\frac{2\omega}{\rho}\right)}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}\left(p_{f,j}^{\theta}\right)^{\frac{\frac{-1}{2\rho}}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}\left(N\right)^{\frac{1+\rho\left(1-\theta\right)-\frac{1+2\rho}{2\rho}}{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}}
\]
\[
\left(1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)-\left(1+\gamma_{f}\right)\left(\omega\left(\theta-1\right)-\frac{2\omega}{\rho}\right)\right)d\log\pi_{f}=\frac{-\theta}{2\rho}d\log p_{f,j}
\]
Now we have 
\[
d\log p_{f,j}=\frac{-2\omega}{1+2\rho}d\log K-\frac{2\rho}{1+2\rho}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{j}-\tau d\log d_{f,j}^{-\tau}\right)
\]
\[
d\log\tilde{x}_{j}=-\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\lambda_{j,A}\left(\tau d\log c_{A}\right)
\]

\]

\]

\]

\]

d\log\tilde{x}_{j}^{F}=d\log D-\sigma d\log p_{j}^{F}-\rho d\log I_{j,I}^{F}
\]

d\log I_{j,I}^{H}=\frac{1}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)+d\log\pi_{j}^{H}
\]

d\log I_{j,I}^{F}=\frac{1}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)+d\log\pi_{j}^{F}
\]
\[
d\log\pi_{j}^{H}=\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)
\]
\[
d\log\pi_{j}^{F}=\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{A}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)
\]
\[
d\log D=\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{F}}d\log p_{j}^{F}+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{H}}d\log p_{j}^{H}
\]

d\log p_{f,j}^{H}=-\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}d\log y_{j}^{H}-\left(\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\times2\rho-1\right)\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\left[\lambda_{N^{F}}d\log y_{j}^{F}+\lambda_{N^{H}}d\log y_{j}^{H}\right]
\]
\[
d\log p_{f,j}^{F}=-\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}d\log y_{j}^{F}-\left(\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\times2\rho-1\right)\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\left[\lambda_{N^{F}}d\log y_{j}^{F}+\lambda_{N^{H}}d\log y_{j}^{H}\right]
\]

\[
\begin{alignedat}{1}d\log y_{j}^{H}= & d\log\tilde{x}_{j}^{H}+\theta d\log P^{H}\\
= & d\log D-\sigma d\log p_{j}^{H}-\rho d\log I_{j,I}^{H}+\theta d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\\
= & d\log D-\sigma d\log p_{j}^{H}-\rho d\left[\frac{1}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)+d\log\pi_{j}^{H}\right]+\theta d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\\
= & d\log D-\sigma d\log p_{j}^{H}-\rho d\left[\frac{1}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)+\left[\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)\right]\right]+\theta d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\\
= & d\log D-\sigma\left[\frac{-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)\right]-\rho d\left[\frac{1}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)+\left[\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)\right]\right]+\theta d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\\
= & \left(1+\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}+\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)d\log D-\sigma\left[\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)\right]-\rho d\left[\frac{1}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)+\left[\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)\right]\right]+\theta d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\\
= & \left(1+\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}-\frac{\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)d\log D+\left(-\sigma\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{I}-\left(1-\lambda_{I}\right)\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}-\rho\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{I}+\theta\right)d\log p_{f,j}^{H}
\end{alignedat}
\]
And we get 
\[
\begin{alignedat}{1}d\log y_{j}^{F}= & d\log\tilde{x}_{j}^{F}+\theta d\log P^{F}\\
= & d\log D-\sigma d\log p_{j}^{F}-\rho d\log I_{j,I}^{F}+\theta d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\\
= & d\log D-\sigma d\log p_{j}^{F}-\rho d\left[\frac{1}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)+d\log\pi_{j}^{F}\right]+\theta d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\\
= & d\log D-\sigma d\log p_{j}^{F}-\rho d\left[\frac{1}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)+\left[\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{A}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)\right]\right]+\theta d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\\
= & d\log D-\sigma\left[\frac{-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)\right]-\rho d\left[\frac{1}{\rho+1}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}-\frac{1}{\rho+1}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)+\left[\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{A}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)\right]\right]+\theta d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\\
= & \left(1+\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}+\frac{-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)d\log D+\left(-\sigma\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{I}-\left(1-\lambda_{I}\right)\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}-\rho\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{I}+\theta\right)d\log p_{f,j}^{F}+\left(-\sigma\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{A}+\lambda_{A}\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}-\rho\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{A}\right)d\log c_{A}
\end{alignedat}
\]
Let's discuss components: 
\[
\left(\underbrace{1}_{\text{Direct Effect of Demand Shifter on Quantities}}+\underbrace{\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}_{\text{Demand>Investment>Prices>j-Market Share}}+\underbrace{\frac{-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}_{\text{Demand>Investment>Less Inputs}}\right)d\log D
\]
\[
\left(\underbrace{-\sigma\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{I}}_{\text{Direct Effect of Final Prices on Demand}}-\underbrace{\left(1-\lambda_{I}\right)\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}}_{\text{Reallocation of Investment to Parts}}-\underbrace{\rho\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{I}}_{\text{Effect of Prices on Investment}}+\underbrace{\theta}_{\text{Competitors's Response}}\right)d\log p_{f,j}^{F}
\]
\[
\left(\underbrace{-\sigma\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{A}}_{\text{Direct Effect of Final Prices on Demand}}+\underbrace{\lambda_{A}\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}}_{\text{Reallocation of Investment to Parts}}-\underbrace{\rho\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{A}}_{\text{Effect of Prices on Investment}}\right)d\log c_{A}
\]
Now let's solve for $d\log D$:
\[
\begin{alignedat}{1}d\log D= & \left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{F}}d\log p_{j}^{F}+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{H}}d\log p_{j}^{H}\\
= & \left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{F}}\left[\frac{-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)\right]+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{H}}\left[\frac{-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}d\log D+\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)\right]\\
= & \left(\sigma-1\right)\frac{-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left[\lambda_{N^{F}}+\lambda_{N^{H}}\right]d\log D+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{F}}\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{H}}\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)\\
\left(1-\left(\sigma-1\right)\frac{-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left[\lambda_{N^{F}}+\lambda_{N^{H}}\right]\right)d\log D= & \left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{F}}\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{H}}\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)\\
d\log D= & \left(1-\frac{\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)^{-1}\left[\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{F}}\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{H}}\frac{1+\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\lambda_{A}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)\right]\\
= & \left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{F}}\left(1+\rho\right)\left(\lambda_{A}d\log c_{A}+\lambda_{I}d\log p_{f,j}^{F}\right)+\left(\sigma-1\right)\lambda_{N^{H}}\left(1+\rho\right)\left(\lambda_{A}d\log p_{f,j}^{H}\right)
\end{alignedat}
\]
The components here are clear.

\end{alignedat}
\]

\end{alignedat}
\end{alignedat}
\]
And then 
\[
\begin{alignedat}{1}d\log y_{j}^{H}= & \left(\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\sigma-1\right)\left(1+\rho\right)\lambda_{I}+\left(\frac{-\sigma-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{I}-\left(1-\lambda_{I}\right)\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}+\theta\right)\right)d\log p_{f,j}^{H}+\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\sigma-1\right)\left(1+\rho\right)\lambda_{N^{F}}\left(\lambda_{I}\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\varsigma_{c_{A}}+\lambda_{A}\right)d\log c_{A}\end{alignedat}

= & \left(-\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}-\left(\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\times2\rho-1\right)\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\right)\left[\left(\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\sigma-1\right)\left(1+\rho\right)\lambda_{I}+\left(\frac{-\sigma-\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\lambda_{I}-\left(1-\lambda_{I}\right)\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}+\theta\right)\right)d\log p_{f,j}^{H}+\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left(\sigma-1\right)\left(1+\rho\right)\lambda_{N^{F}}\left(\lambda_{I}\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\varsigma_{c_{A}}+\lambda_{A}\right)d\log c_{A}\right]+\tilde{\varsigma}_{c_{A}}d\log c_{A}
\end{alignedat}
\]

\subsection{Firms}

Consumers have CES preferences:
\[
U=\left(\int_{0}^{N}q_{j}^{\frac{1}{\sigma}}x_{j}^{\frac{\sigma-1}{\sigma}}dj\right)^{\frac{\sigma}{\sigma-1}}
\]
where $q_{j}$ is the quality derives from a good $j$. The demand
each firm case is 
\[
x_{j}=\bar{D}\frac{\left(p_{j}/q_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}{\underbrace{\int_{0}^{N}p_{j}^{1-\sigma}q_{j}^{\sigma}dj}_{\equiv P^{1-\sigma}}}=\underbrace{D}_{\bar{D}P^{\sigma-1}}\left(p_{j}/q_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}
\]

The firms problem is 
\[
\max_{p_{j}}D\left(p_{j}/q_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}\times\left(p_{j}-c\right)
\]
Which yields
\[
p_{j}=\frac{\sigma}{\sigma-1}c
\]
and 
\[
\pi_{j}=D\tilde{\sigma}c^{1-\sigma}q_{j}^{\sigma}
\]

XXX Change this cost structure to be like before. 

Quality is a function of two components: 
\[
q_{j}=q_{j}^{\text{Assembly}}+q_{j}^{\text{Inputs}}=\bar{q}_{j,A}\left(I_{j,A}\right)^{\rho}+\bar{q}_{j,I}\left(I_{j,I}\right)^{\rho}
\]
The firm can expend on innovation of two kinds: upgrading assembly
or input quality
\[
\max_{I_{j,A},I_{j,I}}\pi_{j}=\tilde{\sigma}\left(q_{j}\right)^{\sigma}D-r\left(I_{j,A}+I_{j,I}\right)
\]
We have 
\[
\pi_{j}=\tilde{\rho}D^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\sigma}}\left(\bar{q}_{j,A}^{\frac{1}{1-\rho}}+\bar{q}_{j,I}^{\frac{1}{1-\rho}}\right)^{\left(1-\rho\right)\frac{\sigma}{1-\rho\sigma}}r^{\frac{-\sigma\rho}{1-\rho\sigma}}
\]

\begin{prop*}
Substituto between innovation. With diminishing returns to innovation
- high quality inputs frees up capacity for innovation on assembly. 
\end{prop*}
There is a payment to inputs of 
\[
c\left(p_{j}/q_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}=\left(c_{A}+c_{I}\right)\left(p_{j}/q_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}=\left(c_{A}+c_{I}\right)\underbrace{\left(\left(\frac{\sigma}{\sigma-1}\left(c_{A}+c_{I}\right)\right)/q_{j}\right)^{-\sigma}}_{x_{j}}
\]
Now upstream firms. They face
\[
\pi_{f}=\sum_{j}\underbrace{\bar{\mu}x_{j}P_{j}^{-1}}_{y_{j}}\left(q_{f,j}\right)^{\theta-1}
\]
where $\left(\mu-1\right)\mu^{-\theta}=\bar{\mu}$. Now $q_{f}$ consists
of a common and specializing component
\[
q_{f,j}=q_{f}^{\text{Shared}}q_{f,j}^{\text{Specialized}}.
\]
\[
I_{f,d,p}=I_{f,p}\frac{x_{f,d,p}}{\sum_{d}x_{f,d,p}}
\]
What if $q_{j}=q_{j}^{\text{Common}}+q_{j}^{\text{Specialized}}$.
Then we have
\[
\max_{\left\{ I_{f},I_{f,j}\right\} }\sum_{j}y_{j}\left(I_{f}^{\rho}I_{f,j}^{\rho}\right)^{\theta-1}-r\left(I_{f}+I_{f,j}\right)
\]
Which yields
\[
\frac{\left(y_{j}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}}{\sum_{j}\left(y_{j}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}}I_{f}=I_{f,j}
\]
\[
\sum_{j}\left(\rho\left(\theta-1\right)y_{j}\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}=I_{f}^{\frac{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}
\]
So we have 
\[
\pi_{f}=\left(\rho\left(\theta-1\right)\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\frac{2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\left(\sum_{j}\left(y_{j}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\right)^{\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}
\]

\begin{prop*}
Interdependence in Costs. Positive, but is going to depend on different
returns in the future to common versus idisoyncratic innovation. 

XXX Also need the change in inputs usage downstream -> propagates
upstream. 
\end{prop*}

We have

D=\bar{D}N^{-1}p_{j}^{\sigma-1}q_{j}^{-\sigma}
\]

\[
\bar{y}_{p,d}\equiv\bar{\mu}\tilde{y}_{d}P_{d,p}^{-1}=\bar{\mu}\tilde{y}_{d}\left(M\left(\frac{p_{f,d,p}}{\delta_{f,d,p}}\right)^{-\theta}\right)^{-1}
\]
\[
\pi_{j}=\tilde{\rho}D^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\sigma}}q^{\frac{-\sigma}{1-\rho\sigma}}\left(\bar{q}_{j,A}^{\frac{1}{1-\rho}}+\bar{q}_{j,I}^{\frac{1}{1-\rho}}\right)^{\left(1-\rho\right)\frac{\sigma}{1-\rho\sigma}}r^{\frac{-\sigma\rho}{1-\rho\sigma}}
\]
\[
\pi_{j}=\tilde{\rho}D^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\sigma}}q^{\frac{-\sigma}{1-\rho\sigma}}\left(\bar{q}_{j,A}^{\frac{1}{1-\rho}}+\bar{q}_{j,I}^{\frac{1}{1-\rho}}\right)^{\frac{\sigma}{1-\rho\sigma}}r^{\frac{-\sigma\rho}{1-\rho\sigma}}
\]

\subsection{Location Choice}

Suppose that assembly can be either in $N$ or $S$, and inputs can
likewise be in either. So we have
\[
\pi_{j}=\tilde{\rho}D^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\sigma}}\left(\bar{q}_{j,A}^{\frac{1}{1-\rho}}\tau_{j}^{\frac{\eta}{1-\rho}}+\bar{q}_{j,I}^{\frac{1}{1-\rho}}\tau_{j,I}^{\frac{\eta}{1-\rho}}\right)^{\left(1-\rho\right)\frac{\sigma}{1-\rho\sigma}}r^{\frac{-\sigma\rho}{1-\rho\sigma}}
\]
\[
\pi_{f}=\left(\rho\left(\theta-1\right)\frac{1}{r}\tau_{j}^{\frac{\eta}{1-\rho}}\right)^{\frac{2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\left(\sum_{j}\left(y_{j}\tau_{f,j}^{\eta\rho}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\right)^{\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}
\]
and we have 
\[
\frac{\left(y_{j}\tau_{f,j}^{\eta\rho}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}}{\sum_{j}\left(y_{j}\tau_{f,j}^{\eta\rho}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}}I_{f}=I_{f,j}
\]
\[
\pi_{f}=\left(\rho\left(\theta-1\right)\frac{1}{r}\tau_{j}^{\frac{\eta}{1-\rho}}\right)^{\frac{2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\left(\sum_{j}\left(y_{j}\tau_{f,j}^{\eta\rho}\right)^{\frac{1}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}\right)^{\frac{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}}
\]

Next, note that the previous comparative static were with respect
to $y_{f,j}$ - which is itself endogenous. When input prices fall
for a particular buyer, this leads to a reorganizing of R\&D within
that firm and across firms upstream. Formally, consider a small shock
to $c_{j,I}$, holding all other input prices fixed. This generates
a response in input demand at competitors: 
\[
\frac{d\log x_{j'\neq j}I_{j'\neq j}^{-\rho}}{d\log c_{j,I}}=\left(\underbrace{1}_{\text{Direct Effect}}+\underbrace{\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}_{\text{R\&D Effect on \text{Quantities}}}-\underbrace{\frac{\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}_{\text{Input R\&D}}\right)\underbrace{\left(\sigma-1\right)\Lambda_{j}\lambda_{j,I}d\log c_{j,I}}_{\text{Demand Shifter Response}}
\]
where $d\log D=\left(\sigma-1\right)\Lambda_{j}\lambda_{j,I}d\log c_{j,I}$
and $\Lambda_{j}$ is firm $j$'s share in price index $\sum_{j\in N}p_{j}^{1-\sigma}$. 

Finally, note that these are all are partial equilibrium effects -
$I_{j,I}^{-\rho}$ is itself endogenous -

when input prices fall, downstream firms reallocation their own R\&D
which has an ambigious effect on their input R\&D - see Proposition
\ref{prop: Downstream Innovation Allocation}. This can either intensidify
of dampen the upstream innovation response.

Consider a change in the input prices that firm $j$ faces: $d\log c_{j,I}$. 

How do input quantities demanded respond to changes in input prices?
Fo
\[
\frac{d\log x_{j'\neq j}I_{j'\neq j}^{-\rho}}{d\log c_{j,I}}=\left(\underbrace{1}_{\text{Direct Effect}}+\underbrace{\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}_{\text{R\&D Effect on \text{Quantities}}}-\underbrace{\frac{\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}_{\text{Input R\&D}}\right)\frac{d\log D}{d\log c_{j,I}}
\]
where $d\log D=\left(\sigma-1\right)\Lambda_{j}\lambda_{j,I}d\log c_{j,I}$
and $\Lambda_{j}$ is firm $j$'s share in price index $\sum_{j\in N}p_{j}^{1-\sigma}$.
As for the firm experiencing the change in input prices, there is
the reallocation effect disucssed in propositon 1, 
\[
\frac{d\log x_{j}I_{j}^{-\rho}}{d\log c_{j,I}}=-\rho\underbrace{\frac{d\log I_{j,I}}{d\log c_{j,I}}}_{\text{Proposition \ref{prop: Downstream Innovation Allocation}}}+\underbrace{\left(\frac{-\sigma}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)\lambda_{j,I}}_{\text{Quantities}}+\frac{d\log x_{j'\neq j}I_{j'\neq j}^{-\rho}}{d\log c_{j,I}}
\]
\[
d\log\tilde{x}_{j'\neq j}=\left(\underbrace{1}_{\text{Direct}}+\underbrace{\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}_{\text{Prices\ensuremath{\rightarrow}\text{Quantities}}}-\underbrace{\frac{\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}_{\text{R\&D}}\right)d\log D
\]
XXX should really do like a full comparative static w.r.t. $\bar{c}_{f,j}$. 

\[
\frac{d\log p_{f,-j}}{d\log c_{j,A}}=\underbrace{\left(\underbrace{\frac{1+2\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}{2\rho}}_{\text{R\&D Reallocation}}-\underbrace{\frac{1+\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}{\rho}}_{\text{R\&D Epansion \& Generic Innovation}}\right)}_{<0}\Lambda_{f,j}\left(-\zeta\right)-\frac{\left(\sigma-1\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\left[\Lambda_{j}\left(\lambda_{j,I}\zeta+\lambda_{j,A}\right)\right]
\]
\[
d\log D=\left(\sigma-1\right)\Lambda_{j}\lambda_{j,I}d\log c_{j,I}
\]

where $\Lambda_{j}$ is firm $j$'s share in price index $\sum_{j\in N}p_{j}^{1-\sigma}$.
\[
\Lambda_{j}=\left(\left(c_{A}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}+\left(c_{I}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}\right)/\sum_{j}\left(\lambda_{2}\left(\left(c_{A}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}+\left(c_{I}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}\right)^{\frac{\rho+1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}\right)^{1-\sigma}

\]
So we get

where
\[

\]
\[
D^{\frac{1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}=\left(\sum_{j}\left(\lambda_{2}\left(\left(c_{A}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}+\left(c_{I}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}\right)^{\frac{\rho+1}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}\right)^{1-\sigma}\right)^{-1}
\]
\[
\tilde{x}_{j}\equiv D^{1+\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}-\frac{\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}\left(\left(c_{A}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}+\left(c_{I}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}\right)^{\frac{-\sigma\left(\rho+1\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}+\rho-\rho\frac{\left(\rho+1\right)\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}\left(c_{I}\right)^{\frac{-\rho}{\rho+1}}
\]
\[
P_{j}\equiv\sum_{f\in M}\left(p_{f,j}\right)^{-\theta}
\]
\[
d\log P_{j}=-\theta\sum_{f}\Lambda_{f}d\log p_{f,j}
\]
Normalize $P=1$?
\[
\tilde{x}_{j}\equiv D^{1+\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}-\frac{\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}\left(\left(c_{A}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}+\left(c_{I}\right)^{\frac{1}{\rho+1}}\right)^{\frac{-\sigma\left(\rho+1\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}+\rho-\rho\frac{\left(\rho+1\right)\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}}\left(c_{I}\right)^{\frac{-\rho}{\rho+1}}
\]
We have 
\[
d\log\tilde{x}_{j}=\left(1+\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}-\frac{\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)d\log D-\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}d\log c_{j,I}+\left(\frac{-\sigma}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}+\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}-\rho\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)\lambda_{j,I}d\log c_{j,I}+\left(\frac{-\sigma}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}+\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}-\rho\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)\lambda_{j,A}d\log c_{j,A}
\]
\[
d\log\tilde{x}_{-j}=\left(1+\frac{\sigma\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}-\frac{\rho}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)d\log D+\left(-\rho+\frac{-\sigma}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}+\frac{\rho}{\rho+1}-\rho\frac{\left(1-\sigma\right)}{1+\rho\left(1-\sigma\right)}\right)\lambda_{-j,I}d\log c_{-j,I}
\]
So we have 
\[
d\log y_{f,j}\equiv d\log\tilde{x}_{j}-d\log P_{j}
\]
And
\[
d\log p_{f,j}=-\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{j}-d\log P_{j}\right)+\sum_{j}\left(\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}-\frac{2\rho}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\right)\Lambda_{f,j}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{j}-d\log P_{j}\right).
\]
Or, let's impose symmetry to get 
\[
d\log p_{f,j}=-\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{j}+\theta d\log p_{f,j}\right)+\left(\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}-\frac{2\rho}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\right)\Lambda_{f,j}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{j}+\theta d\log p_{f,j}\right)+\left(\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}-\frac{2\rho}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\right)\Lambda_{f,-j}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{-j}+\theta d\log p_{f,-j}\right)
\]
and 
\[
d\log p_{f,-j}=-\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{-j}+\theta d\log p_{f,-j}\right)+\left(\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}-\frac{2\rho}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\right)\Lambda_{f,j}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{j}+\theta d\log p_{f,j}\right)+\left(\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}-\frac{2\rho}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\right)\Lambda_{f,-j}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{-j}+\theta d\log p_{f,-j}\right)
\]
So we get 
\[
d\log p_{f,j}-d\log p_{f,-j}=-\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{j}+\theta d\log p_{f,j}\right)+\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\left(d\log\tilde{x}_{-j}+\theta d\log p_{f,-j}\right)

\[

\]
So a change in $d\log c_{A}$ has two effects. It leads to a reallocation
of R\&D
\[
\frac{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{2\rho}\left(\frac{\rho}{1-\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}-\frac{2\rho}{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}\right)\Lambda_{f,j}\left(-\frac{1+\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}{\rho}\zeta\right)=\left(\frac{1-2\rho\left(\theta-1\right)}{2\rho}-\frac{1+\rho\left(1-\theta\right)}{\rho}\right)\Lambda_{f,j}\left(-\zeta\right)

\[

\[

\]
So this first effect, when $d\log c_{A}$ goes down - $d\log\tilde{x}_{-j}$
will be lower than $d\log\tilde{x}_{j}$. As a result, there is an
expansion in the shared component of R\&D - this has a negative effect
on the prices of $p_{f,-j}$. But at the same time, there is a reallocation
downstream towards comeptitiors - as a result there is less innovation.
\[
d\log\tilde{x}_{-j}=d\log\tilde{x}_{j}+\frac{1+\rho}{\rho}\zeta d\log c_{j,A}
\]

\]

\]

\]
